email.description: The email address of the recipient.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the push open event occurred.

campaignId.description: The identifier of the campaign associated with the push open.

templateId.description: The identifier of the template used for the push notification.

messageId.description: The unique identifier of the message.

sentAt.description: The timestamp when the push notification was originally sent.

appAlreadyRunning.description: Whether the app was already running when the push was opened.

actionIdentifier.description: The identifier of the action taken on the push notification.

documentCreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was created.

documentUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was last updated.
